Container.Name: SpotifyBU
Container.Overview: SpotifyBU backs up your own Spotify playlist, song, and album metadata and prepares Navidrome-ready folder plans.
Container.Description: SpotifyBU is a Docker-first web UI for connecting to a user's Spotify account, reading playlists, resolving song and album metadata, exporting JSON/CSV backups, checking a Navidrome library mount, and planning stable folders such as Artist - Album. This release does not rip audio from Spotify, YouTube, or other services.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Container 3000 - Host port for the SpotifyBU web UI

Config.Name: Config Folder
Config.Description: Stores SpotifyBU settings and changed app login credentials

Config.Name: Navidrome Music Library
Config.Description: Host music folder that Navidrome scans

Config.Name: Spotify Client ID
Config.Description: Spotify Developer Dashboard app Client ID

Config.Name: SpotifyBU App Secret
Config.Description: Long random value used to sign SpotifyBU login sessions

Config.Name: Navidrome URL
Config.Description: Navidrome URL as seen by the SpotifyBU container

Config.Name: Public App URL
Config.Description: Optional public SpotifyBU URL. Leave blank to infer from requests, or set this to your reverse proxy URL.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set true only when SpotifyBU is accessed over HTTPS, usually through a reverse proxy

Config.Name: Branch Label
Config.Description: Branch label shown in the SpotifyBU footer
